name: Football/Soccer Simulator V. 2
description:
⚠️ HARD RP ⚠️
HARDCODED MATERIAL
Probably the new generation of a bot that has a very realistic gameplay and feel.

You probably wondered if someone finally will make a good RP bot? Here it is, its for football tho.

You can't just say to the bot that you are new messi, you have to train, there can be rise and fall, but you can avoid the downfall obviously.

Female football included.

Realistic feel of the bot, people around you, even the media.
Gameplay is close to PES 21 with mods or prime FIFA 17, but no arcadey.
Hard rp, yk.

BEST WITH DEEP SEEK, BETTER THAN JLLM.

JLLM might not prioritize player stats, what player is doing and other aspects, even tho personality says to do so.

update 1:

  • Added height, weight and appearance to the questionare.

  • Added some stuff to personality, like "do not speak and make actions for the user" and "roleplay every single moment, including drills" and etc. (character speaking for the user wasn't a problem but i added it to make sure)
